evidence_gates.title: Named operator, fleet, jurisdiction and intended use
Licensed operational navdata, weather, NOTAM, restrictions and performance data
Accepted safety case and preliminary hazard analysis
Operator manuals, procedures, training and backup-process acceptance
Independent operational validation against benchmark cases

requirements.title: The only active runtime mode is simulator until operational evidence is accepted.
verification: Requested approved_operator_build mode is reported as blocked.

requirements.title: A named operator profile defines fleet, jurisdiction, intended function and approval path.
verification: Operator profile is reviewed and linked to the operational release evidence pack.

requirements.title: Operational data sources are licensed, versioned, quality-scored and expiry-gated.
verification: The operational-data-source contract captures source, cycle, timestamp, license, validation state and fallback behavior.
The 2026-07-09 baseline fails closed for every domain that lacks approved operational data.

requirements.title: Requested operational modes expose data-source blockers instead of silently using simulator data.
verification: GET /api/v1/operational-data-sources returns operational_use_enabled=false and blocking_domains for ops_candidate.

requirements.title: Safety case covers route, fuel, weather, filing, display and AI-explanation failure conditions.
verification: Each hazard has severity, mitigation, verification evidence and release evidence requirements.

requirements.title: ICAO FPL validation is available only as a non-transmitted blocked preview.
verification: POST /api/v1/icao-fpl/validate returns filing_enabled=false and validates items 7, 8, 9, 10, 13, 15, 16, 18 and 19.
The 2026-07-09 ICAO FPL baseline rejects filing enablement.

requirements.title: Dispatch release is blocked until approved fuel, performance and signoff evidence exist.
verification: The 2026-07-09 dispatch baseline rejects release enablement.

requirements.title: Requirements, hazards, tests, defects and releases are traceable.
verification: GET /api/v1/assurance-readiness returns assurance_enabled=false and missing traceability gates.
The 2026-07-09 assurance baseline rejects assurance enablement.

requirements.title: Operator manuals, procedures, training and backup process are accepted before operational use.
verification: Approved operator build references accepted manual revision and training evidence.
